originalTitle: Trump says Iran has released US citizen detained since 2024
summary: Dena Karari, dual US-Iranian citizen, ‘now safely outside of Iran, and in good condition’, president posts on Truth Social
content: Donald Trump said Wednesday Iran had agreed to release an American citizen who was “wrongfully detained” since December 2024. “She is now safely outside of Iran, and in good condition,” Trump wrote on social media, without naming the woman. “The United States of America appreciates this gesture of Goodwill by Iran!” Trump’s announcement came as the US launched fresh strikes on Iran. The woman is Dena Karari, a dual American and Iranian citizen, her lawyer Jared Genser announced on social media. Genser said that he was “excited to report” that Karari, who was banned from leaving Iran after visiting her family in 2024, “is now safe and traveling back to the United States”. “This would not have happened but for the extraordinary and relentless efforts” of the president, he added. The New York Times reported last year that an Iranian American woman who was first imprisoned and prevented from leaving the country in December 2024, but released from custody, “works for an American technological company and runs a charity for underprivileged children in Iran”. After the US joined Israel in bombing Iran in 2025, she was charged with espionage. According to a 2023 Guardian profile of Genser, the human rights lawyer nicknamed “the extractor” has managed to free over 340 prisoners of conscience from 20 countries over the past two decades.
chineseTitle: 特朗普称伊朗已释放自2024年以来被拘留的美国公民
chineseSummary: 总统在 Truth Social 上发帖称，拥有美国和伊朗双重国籍的德纳·卡拉里 (Dena Karari) “现在已安全离开伊朗，状况良好”
chineseContent: 唐纳德·特朗普周三表示，伊朗已同意释放一名自 2024 年 12 月以来“被错误拘留”的美国公民。特朗普在社交媒体上写道，“她现在安全地离开伊朗，状况良好”，但没有透露这名女子的名字。 “美利坚合众国赞赏伊朗的这一善意姿态！”特朗普宣布这一消息之际，美国对伊朗发动了新的打击。她的律师贾里德·根瑟在社交媒体上宣布，这名女子名叫德娜·卡拉里 (Dena Karari)，拥有美国和伊朗双重国籍。根瑟表示，他“很高兴地报告”，卡拉里“现在安全了，正在返回美国”。卡拉里在 2024 年探望家人后被禁止离开伊朗。他补充说，“如果没有总统非凡和不懈的努力，这一切就不会发生”。 《纽约时报》去年报道称，一名伊朗裔美国妇女于 2024 年 12 月首次入狱并被禁止出境，后来被释放，“为一家美国科技公司工作，并为伊朗贫困儿童经营一家慈善机构”。 2025年美国与以色列一起轰炸伊朗后，她被指控从事间谍活动。根据 2023 年《卫报》对根瑟的简介，这位绰号为“提取者”的人权律师在过去二十年里成功从 20 个国家释放了 340 多名良心犯。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
